name: Subject Metadata Enrichment
description: Proposes DataCite subject metadata such as scheme URI, value URI, classification code, language, and provenance.

status_labels.completed_with_results: Subject metadata enrichment discovery completed: {count} new suggestion(s) found.
status_labels.completed_empty: Subject metadata enrichment discovery completed: No new suggestions found.
status_labels.already_running: A subject metadata enrichment discovery job is already running.

empty_state.title: No pending subject enrichment suggestions
empty_state.description: No subjects currently have a safe local vocabulary enrichment suggestion.
